data.name: Sweet Night
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Night - 一款以夜歸女孩為題的簡單唯美的拼圖遊戲，五位漂亮可愛的夜歸女孩的日常，有輕鬆音樂伴奏，完成關卡後便可以在畫廊中欣賞女孩的照片。

- 遊戲有三個難度 2x2、2x4、4x4 難度的拼圖

- 於拼圖時按"F"鍵開啟黑白圖

- 玩家在遊戲過程中按下 '空白' 鍵即可完成拼圖。

- 玩家可在畫廊中按AD鍵,左右鍵或滑鼠左右鍵快速觀賞女孩圖片

* 拼圖圖片大小為 800x960 px

* 畫廊圖片大小為 1088x960 px

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Night
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Night - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around girls returning home late at night. It depicts the daily lives of five pretty and adorable girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

- The game has three difficulty levels: 2x2, 2x4, and 4x4.

- Press "F" while working on a puzzle to reveal a black and white image.

- Press the 'Space' key during gameplay to complete the puzzle.

- Players can use the A and D keys, left and right mouse buttons, or the left and right mouse buttons to quickly view the girls' images in the gallery.

* Puzzle image size: 800x960 px

* Gallery image size: 1088x960 px
